text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, T.M. Opera O called me to "come witness the most
regal of training regimens."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what kind of practice she normally does... But before I
have time to really think about it, I arrive at my destination.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, just in time. Let the training now commence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why the surprise? I believe I said we are to train. Where else would
one go?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, stand back and behold.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One, two, aaaand... THREE!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! I dance as beautifully as a swan!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At times elegant... At times dramatic! That's the cue for the thunder—baboom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O's performance continues as I stand there mystified...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What does any of this have to do with training?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... That should do it. Go ahead—you may now give your rave
review.
choice_data_list: Um, words are failing me at the moment...
Um, words are failing me at the moment...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wha... Were you even watching?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, no need to fret. You understandably need time to take in my
artistic vision. Now, on to my next training!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The water is clear as a gleaming diamond... It's as if my coming has
been blessed.
choice_data_list: So what're we doing at the pool?
So what're we doing at the pool?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you not see? I must strike the perfect midair pose... Await my
glory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her words are still unraveling in my mind, Opera O climbs the
diving board and leaps from the top!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark! What dances through the skies with the grace of a swallow? 'Tis
I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaahaha! I hope my radiance didn't blind you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... The final stop on today's training tour lies just atop this staircase!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And we have arrived!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Obviously, we're making a visit to the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clink!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: May my beauty fill the whole world with happiness...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: May my beauty fill the whole world with happiness!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That is how we say our prayers at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's hurry back to school before the heavens grow wrathful in
their envy of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her unique style of preparation completed, we've returned to
the academy. Maybe now we can get to some actual work...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haha, what a worthwhile day of training it's been.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you? Having spent the day together, have you come to
comprehend my brilliance?
choice_data_list: You don't want to do any normal training?
You don't want to do any normal training?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Normal training? My naive friend, that was my normal training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A cut above the rest, to be sure. For that is what one must shoulder as
the Centurial Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be completely serious, but could that really be how she
wants to train?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You appear to have something to say. Go on, I shall grant you the
chance.
choice_data_list: Being the Overlord means having to win races.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that goes without saying. Perhaps at this very moment, you're
thinking...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
"You won't win if you don't take training seriously. You'll never be
Overlord."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then let me tell you this, Trainer. I am always serious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And this is the optimum training for a ruler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's filled with such shameless confidence that there's nothing I can
say otherwise.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You seem unconvinced...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A terrible shame—I'm afraid we'll have to call off our provisional
arrangement. I require a trainer willing to follow me to my dreams.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for taking up your time. May we meet again someday.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, off to a fine rose bath to wash away the fatigue of hard work!
Haaah ha ha ha ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M Opera O makes a grand departure, but doesn't seem to have
been offended.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her go, a tinge of regret comes over me. Maybe I shouldn't
have spoken that way...
